retry_reason: Retry is not applicable because this is not a wrapper; the timer cancellation may succeed or fail but the refcount operation is not the core purpose.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is to cancel a watchdog timer, not refcount management. The i915_request_put call is an incidental side effect that only occurs when the timer was successfully cancelled.
